description.value: Aura moderate conjuration and transmutation; CL 9th; Slot feet; Price 24,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION These sandals are woven from grass, lengths of pliant vine, living leaves, and supple bark. In forest terrain, the wearer leaves no tracks or scent and gains a +2 competence bonus on Stealth checks. The wearer can move through natural undergrowth without impediment or harm as a druid using woodland stride, and once per day she may step inside a tree and remain there for up to 9 hours, or teleport to a similar tree within range, as tree stride but allowing only a single teleport. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, pass without trace, tree stride; Special creator must be a druid; Cost 12,000 gp.
